\tzpentry{ID4303}{Energy Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4303 introduces Energy Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$E_i(t)=\frac12\left(\dot q_i^2+\omega_i^2 q_i^2\right)$
\]
